name: Fish Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Fish fillets; fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. If frozen, thaw the fish fillets.
2. Remove bones and skin from the fish; cut into 1-inch pieces.
3. Cut bacon into 1/2-inch pieces.
4. In a large saucepan over moderate heat, fry the bacon until crisp, stirring frequently.
5. Add onion and cook and stir until tender and translucent.
6. Add diced tomatoes and tomato liquid from the can.
7. Add all remaining ingredients except fish and parsley to the onions.
8. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about 45 minutes.
9. Add fish; cover and simmer for another 10 to 12 minutes until fish flakes and is tender.
10. Garnish each serving with a sprinkle of parsley.
